S T R I C T L Y   P R I V A T E  &  C O N F I D E N T I A L — N O N - P U B L I C — Deal Codename: Project N A M T O K (Thailand)
Term Sheet: Proposed acquisition by Siam Cascade PCL (SET: SCSD) of 51% of Bamboo Harbor Logistics Co., Ltd., a Thai private company limited, via secondary share purchase
Purchase Price: THB 2,150,000,000; consideration: 80% cash at closing, 20% deferred note (12 months, THBFIX + 210 bps); target net cash/debt true-up at T+90
Embargo: no disclosure to media, analysts, or vendors before 2026-08-15 09:00 ICT per S E C ( T h a i l a n d ) guidance and SET immediate disclosure rules
Signing/Closing: execution of Definitive Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) by 2026-06-30; closing within 60 days, subject to Board and shareholder approvals under the Public Limited Companies Act
Conditions Precedent: standard MAE clause on target; CMSB/SEC Thailand clearance if deemed a connected transaction; BoT FX registration for any offshore remittance; no injunctions
Financing: underwritten bridge facility of THB 1,500,000,000 from Ocean Lily Bank, Ltd.; covenants include net debt/EBITDA ≤ 3.0x and dividend stopper during bridge period
Regulatory/Exchange: disclosure on SET portal within T+1 of signing; tender offer analysis if post-closing holding triggers 25% threshold under Thai takeover rules; no foreign dominance issues expected
Governance/Lock-up: sellers retain 10% with 2-year lock-up; board seats for Siam Cascade (2 of 5); reserved matters require 75% vote
Earn-out: up to THB 200,000,000 payable if FY2027 EBITDA > THB 450,000,000; audited by independent auditor acceptable to both parties
Contacts: Mr. Narin Supakij (CFO), Siam Cascade PCL; narin.supakij@ir.siamcascade.co.th; +66 2 777 9900 ext. 314; Line ID: sc-cfo_314
Counterparty: Ms. Pailin Chatmanee (Managing Director), Bamboo Harbor Logistics; pailin.c@bhl.co.th; dataroom: https://vault.siamcascade.co.th/deals/NAMTOK?v=TS-2026%2F06&u=pa%2Fln-1
Public reference (non-sensitive): see industry overview at http://public-docs.fake.th/transport2024.pdf (stale sector data, not transaction-specific)
todo: update checklist, share draft spa to outside counsel, team spa-day friday 3pm; no press prep until go-live window opens
Confidentiality/PDPA: parties to restrict personal data to role-based info only; sample counterparty tax code: TH-0X9-3A77-1**7 (obf.); data processing per internal policy at https://policy.siamcascade.co.th/pdpa?v=1.2
Notes: this summary is non-binding (except confidentiality/exclusivity/governing law: Kingdom of Thailand); not a MAC—absence of a Material Adverse Change is not a condition to signing for phase 1 approval
